title: Childcare Teacher @ MacPherson Sheng Hong Child Care Centre
description:
Purpose of the Job

Design and implement engaging, age-appropriate programmes that promote the holistic development of young children. The role is dedicated to supporting their growth in a safe, nurturing environment that inspires a lifelong passion for learning.

Job Description

Classroom Management:

  • Plan and conduct lessons and activities tailored to children’s developmental needs.
  • Set up and maintain a safe, clean, and stimulating classroom environment.
  • Engage children in learning through music, storytelling, games and hands-on exploration.
  • Set up Learning Centres with purposeful activities that align with the current theme and support desired learning outcomes.
  • Support children during daily routines such as meals, hygiene, and nap time.

Working with Parents and Team:

  • Observe and document each child’s progress.
  • Communicate regularly with parents and keep the Principal informed of any concerns.
  • Participate in scheduled parent-teacher meetings.
  • Collaborate closely with colleagues to ensure consistent care practices and promote a supportive team environment.

Health and Safety:

  • Conduct daily attendance and health checks.
  • Ensure the classroom remains hygienic and meets health and safety standards.
  • Follow centre policies and ECDA regulations.

Administrative and Centre Support:

  • Participate in staff meetings, training, and centre events.
  • Help organize festive celebrations and centre activities.
  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Principal or Management.

Qualifications and Experience

  • Certificate in Pre-school Education - Teaching (CPE-T) / Advanced Certificate in Early Childhood Care and Education (ACECCE), or its equivalent recognized by ECDA
  • Diploma in Pre-school Education – Teaching (DPE-T) / Diploma in Early Childhood Care and Education (DECCE-T), or its equivalent recognized by ECDA
  • ECDA L1/L2 certification
  • With at least 1 year of relevant teaching experience in a childcare setting

postedCompany.description:
Society of Sheng Hong Welfare Services (SSHWS) was set up as the welfare arm of Lorong Koo Chye Sheng Hong Temple Association with the objective of carrying out relevant good work and welfare activities to relieve hardship as well as to bring benefits to the society and the community.


Membership to SSHWS is open to all of age 18 and above, sharing the same objectives irrespective of race, colour, creed, religion, language, sex and social status.


SSHWS is governed by a Management Committee whose members are elected according to the governing instrument, which is the Constitution. All our members serve on a voluntary basis without receiving any form of remuneration.


SSHWS holds the status of Institution of Public Character (IPC) since 3 November 2000. With the IPC status, all outright cash donations are tax deductible.
postedCompany.name: Society of Sheng Hong Welfare Services
